title: felicia ebracteata
intro: Felicia ebracteata, also known as Blue Felicia, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of Blue Felicia include its use as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory, which can help to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections and reduce swelling. The health benefits of consuming Blue Felicia include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Blue Felicia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
